title: Specialized Jersey
description: This Specialized racing jersey represents the long-standing involvement of Specialized Bicycle Components in BMX and cycling culture. Jerseys like this were worn by riders and team members during races and promotional events, reflecting the brand identity and sponsorship presence that became a central part of competitive BMX.
additional_context: Racing jersey produced by Specialized Bicycle Components, reflecting the company’s long-standing involvement in BMX and cycling culture. Jerseys like this were worn by riders and team members during competitions and promotional events, representing the brand identity and sponsorship presence that became central to modern BMX racing.
